game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept:
Hunted and alone, a boy finds himself drawn into the center of a dark project. INSIDE is a dark, narrative-driven platformer combining intense action with challenging puzzles. It has been critically acclaimed for its moody art style, ambient soundtrack and unsettling atmosphere.

Hunted and alone, a boy finds himself drawn into the center of a dark project.

Try Playdead’s award-winning indie adventure game. INSIDE is a dark, narrative-driven platformer combining intense action with challenging puzzles. It has been critically acclaimed for its moody art style, ambient soundtrack and unsettling atmosphere.
game_info.description: You are a boy escaping from a dark facility filled with danger. Navigate through atmospheric environments, avoid deadly obstacles, solve physics-based puzzles, and evade surveillance. Reach the exit portal at the end of each level to progress. The facility grows more treacherous as you advance - stay alert and use your wits to survive.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Left/Right: Move left and right
Arrow Up: Jump
Arrow Down: Crouch/Interact with objects
Space: Push/Pull objects
Shift: Sprint (when moving)
Z: Action (activate switches/mechanisms)
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart (return to start screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and collision testing. Validates that the player can move, jump, and interact with the environment without glitching through walls or floors.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Systematically test all movement controls including walking, jumping, crouching, and sprinting. Move through the level while ensuring collision detection works properly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully moves through the environment with proper physics. No clipping through walls or floors. All movement controls respond correctly.

TEST_1.expected: Player successfully moves through the environment with proper physics. No clipping through walls or floors. All movement controls respond correctly.

TEST_2.test_description: Win condition testing with optimal pathfinding. Tests the complete game flow from start to finish using the most efficient strategy.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Navigate through all levels using optimal movement and puzzle-solving. Push boxes when needed, avoid obstacles efficiently, interact with switches, and reach the final exit portal.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully complete all levels and reach GAME_OVER_WIN state. All puzzles solved correctly and all obstacles avoided.
TEST_2.description: Win condition testing with optimal pathfinding. Tests the complete game flow from start to finish using the most efficient strategy.

TEST_2.expected: Successfully complete all levels and reach GAME_OVER_WIN state. All puzzles solved correctly and all obstacles avoided.

TEST_3.test_description: Object interaction and puzzle mechanics testing. Validates that pushing/pulling boxes and activating switches works correctly.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Focus on interacting with movable objects and switches. Test pushing boxes to create platforms and activating mechanisms to open paths.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: All interactive objects respond correctly. Boxes can be pushed and used as platforms. Switches activate their corresponding mechanisms.
TEST_3.description: Object interaction and puzzle mechanics testing. Validates that pushing/pulling boxes and activating switches works correctly.

TEST_4.test_description: Hazard avoidance and death conditions. Tests that deadly obstacles properly trigger game over conditions.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Intentionally trigger various hazards including spikes, pits, and surveillance detection to validate death mechanics work correctly.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Each hazard type properly triggers GAME_OVER_LOSE. Death animation plays and restart prompt appears.
